opensky.title: OpenSky Aerial Imagery
opensky.subtitle: Community-powered satellite alternative
opensky.be_first: Be the first to contribute aerial imagery!
opensky.no_your_missions: You haven't uploaded any missions yet
opensky.upload_cta: Upload drone photos to create your first mission!
opensky.drag_drop: Drag & drop ZIP archive with drone photos
opensky.drag_drop_multi: Drag & drop JPG photos or ZIP archives
opensky.select_multiple: Direct JPG upload is faster (no ZIP compression needed)
opensky.upload_info: Photos must have GPS EXIF data. Processing takes 10-60 minutes depending on area size. Max 2GB.
opensky.upload_info_multi: Drag JPG files directly (faster, no zipping needed) or ZIP archives. GPS EXIF required. Max 2GB per request.
opensky.upload_info_hex: Upload photos from one tile at a time. Use the tile grid on the map to plan flights. GPS EXIF required. Max 2GB.
opensky.too_many_photos_warning: Over 600 photos — are you uploading multiple tiles? Upload one tile per mission for best results.
opensky.delete_confirm_text: This will permanently delete the mission and all associated tiles. This action cannot be undone.
opensky.viewer_controls: Drag to rotate, scroll to zoom, right-click to pan
opensky.mesh_confirm_text: 3D generation takes 1-4 hours. Source photos will be reprocessed with full photogrammetry pipeline.
opensky.satellite_align_tooltip: Check and correct GPS offset using satellite imagery
